signals: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.4 con enfoque masivo en razonamiento, agentes y revision de codigo avanzada.
NVIDIA impulsa la creacion de infraestructura de inteligencia soberana en Europa para liderar la nueva industria.
OpenAI adquiere Promptfoo para asegurar la seguridad en flujos de trabajo de agentes autonomos.
Necesidad critica de chiplets y nuevas arquitecturas ante el aumento del 400 por ciento en datos de fabricacion.
Avances en modelos especializados de alta velocidad para musica (Lyria 3) e imagenes (Nano Banana 2).
risks: La infraestructura electrica y de interconexion actual es incapaz de seguir el ritmo del crecimiento de datos.
Brechas de seguridad en agentes autonomos requieren evaluacion formal para despliegues comerciales seguros.
Saturacion de datos en la fabricacion de chips exige alternativas inmediatas al silicio tradicional.
watch: Adopcion real de GPT-5.4 en entornos productivos de desarrollo mediante el uso de Codex.
Despliegue de infraestructura de inteligencia en paises europeos para reducir dependencia tecnologica.
Impacto de las nuevas herramientas de verificacion NoC en el ciclo de diseño de semiconductores.

items.title: WEBINAR: Outrunning the Data Wave – Why we need to keep pace with the coming 400% data surge
items.summary: The semiconductor manufacturing industry has hit a new era of data intensity. We know that we need to look at alternatives to silicon and that electrical interconnects are unable to keep pace. We know we need to design more chiplets and alter microchip architecture. But how much data are we talking specifically, and how much … Read More The post WEBINAR: Outrunning the Data Wave – Why we need to keep pace with the coming 400% data surge appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La industria requiere un cambio radical hacia chiplets y alternativas al silicio por el aumento critico de datos.

items.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning...
items.summary: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one frontier model. Developers coming from other tools are often impressed by what Codex finds in code review. In this video, and I show how to set it up and walk through issues Codex finds in real PRs. Included with ChatGPT Plus/Pro (or ~$1/run with credits).
items.why: GPT-5.4 marca la frontera actual en razonamiento logico y flujos de agentes integrados en API y Codex.

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.why: Integracion de Lyria 3 en Gemini para generacion de musica competitiva a partir de texto e imagenes.

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: A screen capture of Project Genie, an experimental interface showing a grid of circular images, many of which appear to be 360-degree views, with a large, central black globe labeled Create your own
items.why: Project Genie explora la creacion de mundos virtuales mediante interfaces experimentales de IA.

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.why: Actualizaciones incrementales en Translate para mejorar el contexto y la comprension de lenguajes naturales.

items.title: Axiomise Introduces nocProve to Transform NoC Design Verification
items.summary: Axiomise has recently launched a new verification tool called nocProve which will transform how Network-on-Chip designs are validated in modern hardware development, absolutely. The tool is designed to be the first configurable formal verification application specifically created for NoC implementations. It addresses… Read More The post Axiomise Introduces nocProve to Transform NoC Design Verification appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: nocProve automatiza la verificacion formal de Network-on-Chip, vital para la escalabilidad de hardware moderno.

items.title: It’s a Sign: AI Platform for Teaching American Sign Language Aims to Bridge Communication Gaps
items.summary: American Sign Language is the third most prevalent language in the United States — but there are vastly fewer AI tools developed with ASL data than data representing the country’s most common languages, English and Spanish. NVIDIA, the American Society for Deaf Children and creative agency Hello Monday are helping close this gap with Signs, […]
items.why: NVIDIA utiliza IA para cerrar la brecha de comunicacion en lenguaje de señas americano (ASL).

items.title: Ravi Subramanian on Trends that are Shaping AI at Synopsys
items.summary: Right before the Synopsys Converge Keynote I caught an interview with Ravi Subramanian, Chief Product Management Officer at Synopsys, which highlights several important trends shaping the future of AI, semiconductor technology, and engineering. His discussion focuses on how the worlds of silicon design and system engineering… Read More The post Ravi Subramanian on Trends that are Shaping AI at Synopsys appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La convergencia entre diseño de sistemas y silicio es fundamental para las tendencias futuras de IA.

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.why: Iniciativa de capacitacion masiva para mitigar la brecha de talento tecnico en hubs regionales.

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.why: Nano Banana 2 prioriza la velocidad de produccion y consistencia de sujetos para flujos de trabajo profesionales.

items.title: We’re acquiring Promptfoo. Their technology will strengthen agentic security testing and evaluation capabilities in OpenAI Frontier. Promptfoo will remain op...
items.summary: We’re acquiring Promptfoo. Their technology will strengthen agentic security testing and evaluation capabilities in OpenAI Frontier. Promptfoo will remain open source under the current license, and we will continue to service and support current customers.
items.why: La adquisicion de Promptfoo refuerza la seguridad y evaluacion de agentes en la plataforma de OpenAI.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Drops the Blueprint for Europe’s AI Boom
items.summary: At GTC Paris — held alongside VivaTech, Europe’s largest tech event — NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang delivered a clear message: Europe isn’t just adopting AI — it’s building it. “We now have a new industry, an AI industry, and it’s now part of the new infrastructure, called intelligence infrastructure, that will be used […]
items.why: Jensen Huang define la infraestructura de inteligencia como la base de la nueva industria tecnologica europea.

items.title: What does it take to build AI for scientific discovery? ![Image 4: 🧠](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9e0.svg) To celebrate 10 years of AlphaGo, and j...
items.summary: What does it take to build AI for scientific discovery? ![Image 4: 🧠](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9e0.svg) To celebrate 10 years of AlphaGo, and joined on our podcast to discuss how mastering games has paved the way for it to help solve more complex problems. ↓ [00:00](https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2032147864042803617?t=0) The AlphaGo match [02:15](https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2032147864042803617?t=135)
items.why: Reflexion sobre como el aprendizaje basado en juegos impulsa descubrimientos en ciencias complejas.

items.title: NO PANICANS! U.S. forces continue to degrade Iranian military capability. 3+ hour TSA lines for travelers. 300+ TSA officers who have quit. A $0 paycheck for...
items.summary: NO PANICANS! U.S. forces continue to degrade Iranian military capability. 3+ hour TSA lines for travelers. 300+ TSA officers who have quit. A $0 paycheck for those continuing to serve. Enough is enough. No more playing politics with the lives of Americans. The Democrat shutdown of DHS must end now. It’s time for Democrats to end their DHS shutdown and pay our agents.
items.why: Inestabilidad politica en EE.UU. con impacto nulo en el desarrollo tecnico directo de la inteligencia artificial.
